aboutBody:
I'm a multidisciplinary artist working between traditional painting, digital illustration, and photography. My work chases contrast — bold color against stillness, motion frozen mid-frame. This site is a living archive of finished pieces and experiments.

Open to commissions and collaborations.
heroStatement: An ongoing collection of work made across canvas, screen, and film — line, color, and the quiet drama in between.
metaDescription: Selected works of Emaad — painting, illustration, and photography.
